german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Highly Accessible
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German proficiency, highlighting an imbalance in language expectations.

pm_type.title: Core and Customer-facing PMs Dominate Equally
pm_type.subtitle: Balanced representation indicates no significant preference for one PM type over the other.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 60% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is heavily senior-focused.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote or hybrid options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All opportunities are located in Berlin, with no remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Key Roles
ai.subtitle: Only 29% of positions prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
